WAVE4_GATE: v74 (issue-photos -> private) and #22 (enforcement flags) are HELD. They break LIVE iOS App Store users (old client: no signed-URL shim, no re-auth UI). TestFlight is a beta, NOT the App Store release. v74 + #22 may only be applied AFTER the new build is RELEASED to the App Store (submit -> Apple review -> release) so live users are not broken. T2.1 (close_out_ptw enforcement) is bundled with #22 (no-op until flags flip).
